deathsdoor:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
deathsdoor:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

deathsdoor:UmbrellaStrike.NAME: Umbrella Strike
deathsdoor:UmbrellaStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Exhaust !M!. NL Exhaust.

deathsdoor:MagicBomb.NAME: Magic Bomb
deathsdoor:MagicBomb.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. NL Deal an additional !M! damage for each card currently in your draw pile. NL Exhaust.

deathsdoor:MagicalCrow.NAME: Magical Crow
deathsdoor:MagicalCrow.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Gain !M! Strength and Dexterity.

deathsdoor:GrandSoul.NAME: Grand Soul
deathsdoor:GrandSoul.DESCRIPTION: Gain !M! Gold. NL Lose 10 HP. NL Exhaust.
